name: Some Oroshi (White-radish and Red-Pepper Garn
recipeInstructions:
1. Make 4 openings in the flat side of the daikon using chopsticks or the tip of a knife.
2. Insert a red pepper deep into each opening, so that the tip is level with the daikon.
3. Set aside for at least 4 hours. The daikon's moisture will reconstitute the pepper and the pepper will have spiced the daikon.
4. Grate the daikon, divide into 6 equal parts, and roll into a small ball.
5. To serve: Pour the pon-su (equal parts soy-sauce and lemon juice) over each dish. Garnish with onion and serve with sashimi.
